name: @migration-utility/evals
description: Promptfoo eval harness for agent and skill testing

scripts.eval: promptfoo eval -c packages/scoping/skill-discover-show.yaml -c packages/scoping/agent-scoping.yaml -c packages/profiler/skill-profile.yaml -c packages/profiler/agent-profiler.yaml -c packages/migrator/skill-migrate.yaml -c packages/migrator/agent-migrator.yaml
